title: GitHub - bitwize-ai/Logue: Privacy-first AI meeting notes & writing assistant for Mac — on-device transcription, smart minutes, action items & 60+ writing modes, running entirely on Apple Silicon
excerpt: Privacy-first AI meeting notes & writing assistant for Mac — on-device transcription, smart minutes, action items & 60+ writing modes, running entirely on Apple Silicon - bitwize-ai/Logue
content_html:
Privacy-first AI meeting notes & writing assistant for macOS.
On-device transcription, Smart Minutes, and 60+ writing modes — all powered by Apple Silicon. Nothing leaves your Mac.

Download for macOS  •  Build from Source  •  Contributing  •  Request a feature

Introduction

Logue is a privacy-first AI meeting-notes and writing assistant for macOS. It combines real-time audio transcription, speaker diarization, and intelligent document editing — all powered entirely on-device via MLX on Apple Silicon. By default your meetings, notes, and conversations stay on your Mac — the only network calls are on-device model downloads, update checks, and the opt-in features you explicitly enable (web search and external AI providers).

This repository contains the full Logue app source: the LLM engine, recording pipeline, agentic AI chat, writing editor, and test suites. Bitwize builds Logue for professionals and students who want the full power of AI without sacrificing privacy.

New here? Read CONTRIBUTING.md to get set up and learn the standards every pull request follows.

Table of contents

  • ✨ Features
  • 🖼 Screenshots
  • 📥 Install (users)
  • 🚀 Build from Source
  • ⚙️ Configuration
  • 📚 Documentation
  • 🗺 Project Layout
  • 👏 Contributing
  • ❓ FAQ
  • 📄 License

✨ Features

🎙 Meeting Intelligence

  • Real-time transcription — powered by Apple's SpeechTranscriber (macOS 26+), streaming audio directly with no buffering delays
  • Speaker diarization — identifies and labels individual speakers using FluidAudio's Sortformer model, with a batch fallback for accuracy
  • System audio capture — records mic and system audio simultaneously via ScreenCaptureKit; no meeting bot joins your call
  • Smart Minutes — generates structured summaries with key decisions, themes, and follow-ups
  • Smart transcript highlights — AI automatically extracts the most important moments; manual bookmarks are always preserved
  • Action item extraction — pulls tasks, owners, and due dates from the transcript automatically
  • Meeting prep briefing — AI-generated context brief before a meeting starts, based on linked documents and prior notes
  • Meeting ↔ Document links — bidirectional links between meetings and related documents with back-link chips in the editor

✍️ AI Writing Editor

  • Block-based rich text editor — built on NSTextView with full SwiftUI integration
  • Grammar & clarity suggestions — inline AI-powered suggestions with one-tap acceptance
  • Tone analysis — detects and adjusts the tone of selected text
  • Vocabulary enhancement — suggests richer alternatives, validated against the actual document content
  • Rewrite & review panels — rewrite selected passages or get structural feedback on the whole document
  • Fact verification — flags claims that may need a source
  • Table support — full table creation, editing, and context menus inside the editor
  • Writing goals — set and track word count, reading level, and tone targets

🤖 Ask Logue — Agentic AI Chat

  • Multi-step agentic reasoning — powered by LangGraph-Swift; plans, reasons, and executes multi-step workflows
  • Streaming responses — live token-by-token output with animated indicators
  • Inline diagrams & LaTeX — renders Mermaid diagrams and math expressions directly in the chat thread
  • Deep research mode — progress tracking for long-running multi-source research tasks
  • Tool execution UI — shows exactly what actions the agent is taking, with approval controls
  • Sources panel — lists every document and meeting the agent consulted
  • Persistent memory & history — the agent remembers context across conversations, all searchable

🔍 Search, Tasks & Discovery

  • Unified ⌘K search — searches across documents, meetings, and action items in one keystroke, with keyword-centered snippets
  • Full-text search (FTS5) — fast, ranked full-text search across all meeting transcripts and document bodies
  • Action item dashboard — every task from every meeting in one place, with smart filters (All / Pending / Overdue / Today / This Week / Completed), sort, search, and a live sidebar overdue badge

🔒 Privacy & Security

  • On-device AI by default — inference, transcription, and diarization run locally via MLX on Apple Silicon; no content is sent to any cloud service unless you opt into web search or an external AI provider
  • AES-256-GCM encryption at rest — all meeting data and documents are encrypted on disk
  • No account required — download and start working; there's no sign-up, no telemetry gate, no cloud dependency
  • Sandboxed release builds — App Sandbox is enabled in production, and every entitlement exception is documented

🖼 Screenshots

Meeting transcription + Ask Logue Smart Minutes
AI writing editor with fact-checking On-device PII detection

📥 Install (users)

Requirements: macOS 26.0 (Tahoe) or later on Apple Silicon (M1 or newer).

  1. Download the latest Logue-<version>.dmg from the Releases page.
  2. Open the DMG and drag Logue into your Applications folder.
  3. Launch it. On first run, macOS Gatekeeper may prompt — right-click the app → Open.

Updates are delivered in-app via Sparkle: Logue checks the GitHub-hosted feed on launch and prompts you to install new versions. Updating only replaces the app — your meetings, documents, and downloaded models are stored separately and are never touched. To update manually, download the newest DMG and drag it over the old app.

🚀 Build from Source

Prerequisites: macOS 26.0+ (Tahoe) on Apple Silicon, Xcode 26+ (it ships the macOS 26 SDK required by SpeechTranscriber), and XcodeGen.

1. Clone with submodules (vendored dependencies live under Vendor/):

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/bitwize-ai/Logue.git
cd Logue

2. Download the Metal toolchain (one-time; required by MLX):

xcodebuild -downloadComponent MetalToolchain

3. Install tooling and generate the Xcode project:

brew install xcodegen swiftformat swiftlint
xcodegen generate

4. Build and run — open in Xcode and hit Run, or from the CLI:

# The signing flags let you build without an Apple Developer account.
xcodebuild build -project Logue.xcodeproj -scheme Logue -destination 'platform=macOS' \
  CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="-" CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
open Logue.xcodeproj

Already cloned without submodules? Run git submodule update --init --recursive. Re-run xcodegen generate whenever you add/remove .swift files or edit project.yml.

Dev builds use ad-hoc signing with the sandbox off — no Apple Developer account needed just to build and run. (In Xcode, if the build stops at signing, either pick your team under Signing & Capabilities or use the CLI flags above.) Full linting and git-hook setup are in docs/dev-setup.md.

⚙️ Configuration

Logue runs fully on-device out of the box — no keys or accounts are required to build, run, or use it. Everything below is optional and only relevant if you fork the project or cut your own signed releases. Nothing is hardcoded to secrets: all credentials are read from your own environment / GitHub Actions secrets.

Optional external AI providers. Alongside the on-device MLX models, you can add OpenAI-/Anthropic-compatible or OpenRouter/Ollama/LM Studio endpoints under Settings → Models. Keys are entered in-app and stored in your macOS Keychain — never in the repo.

Running your own signed builds / releases. To ship notarized builds under your own identity, set these as GitHub Actions repository secrets (the release workflow reads them — none are committed):

Secret Purpose
APPLE_TEAM_ID Apple Developer Team ID
APPLE_CERTIFICATE_BASE64 / APPLE_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD "Developer ID Application" cert (base64 .p12 + password)
APPLE_ID / APPLE_APP_PASSWORD Apple ID + app-specific password for notarization
SPARKLE_PRIVATE_KEY EdDSA key that signs auto-update ZIPs

For a signed fork you'll also want to change, in project.yml:

  • the bundle identifier (PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER, default com.bitwize.logue);
  • the iCloud container identifiers (iCloud.com.bitwize.logue) in Logue.entitlements — these are tied to your Apple Developer account, so point them at a container you own if you want iCloud sync (or remove them). The shipped release entitlements don't include iCloud, so signed release builds aren't affected;
  • to run your own update channel, SUFeedURL + SUPublicEDKey.

Building and running unsigned dev builds needs none of the above. See docs/dev-setup.md and docs/SPARKLE_UPDATE_FLOW.md.

📚 Documentation

  • Developer Setup
  • Contributing Guide
  • Sparkle Update Flow
  • Scripts Reference
  • Security Policy

🗺 Project Layout

  • Logue/ — Main Swift source; SwiftUI + AppKit application target.
  • Logue/Engine/ — LLM inference actor, prompt builders, and retry helpers. All AI logic lives here.
  • Logue/Services/ — Recording pipeline, transcription, speaker diarization, encryption, and scheduling services.
  • Logue/Views/ — All SwiftUI views: Meeting workspace, Writing editor, Ask Logue chat, Action items, Settings, and more.
  • LogueTests/ — Swift Testing suites (@Suite, @Test), including real-inference LLM integration tests.
  • Vendor/ — Vendored git submodule dependencies — no remote access required at build time.
  • docs/ — Developer setup and release documentation.
  • scripts/ — Release build script, Sparkle appcast updater, and export options plist.

👏 Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Read CONTRIBUTING.md for setup and the security, concurrency, and SwiftLint standards enforced on every pull request. The full, always-current ruleset the project builds against lives in CLAUDE.md.

Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue.

❓ FAQ

Have questions about using Logue? Check the FAQ on our site, or email us at support@bitwize.ai.

📄 License

Logue is open source under the MIT License — © 2026 Bitwize.

Some vendored dependencies under Vendor/ are licensed separately (MIT, BSD, Apache-2.0); see each package for details.

blocks.html_en: • Table support — full table creation, editing, and context menus inside the editor

sentences.en: Table support — full table creation, editing, and context menus inside the editor
sentences.zh: 表格支持 - 编辑器内的完整表格创建、编辑和上下文菜单

blocks.html_en: • Writing goals — set and track word count, reading level, and tone targets

sentences.en: Writing goals — set and track word count, reading level, and tone targets
sentences.zh: 写作目标——设定并跟踪字数、阅读水平和语气目标

blocks.html_en: 🤖 Ask Logue — Agentic AI Chat

sentences.en: 🤖 Ask Logue — Agentic AI Chat
sentences.zh: 🤖 Ask Logue — Agentic AI 聊天

blocks.html_en: • Multi-step agentic reasoning — powered by LangGraph-Swift; plans, reasons, and executes multi-step workflows

sentences.en: Multi-step agentic reasoning — powered by LangGraph-Swift; plans, reasons, and executes multi-step workflows
sentences.zh: 多步代理推理——由 LangGraph-Swift 提供支持；计划、原因和执行多步骤工作流程

blocks.html_en: • Streaming responses — live token-by-token output with animated indicators

sentences.en: Streaming responses — live token-by-token output with animated indicators
sentences.zh: 流式响应——带有动画指示器的实时逐个令牌输出

blocks.html_en: • Inline diagrams & LaTeX — renders Mermaid diagrams and math expressions directly in the chat thread

sentences.en: Inline diagrams & LaTeX — renders Mermaid diagrams and math expressions directly in the chat thread
sentences.zh: 内联图和 LaTeX — 直接在聊天线程中渲染美人鱼图和数学表达式

blocks.html_en: • Deep research mode — progress tracking for long-running multi-source research tasks

sentences.en: Deep research mode — progress tracking for long-running multi-source research tasks
sentences.zh: 深度研究模式——长期运行的多源研究任务的进度跟踪

blocks.html_en: • Tool execution UI — shows exactly what actions the agent is taking, with approval controls

sentences.en: Tool execution UI — shows exactly what actions the agent is taking, with approval controls
sentences.zh: 工具执行 UI — 通过批准控制准确显示代理正在采取的操作

blocks.html_en: • Sources panel — lists every document and meeting the agent consulted

sentences.en: Sources panel — lists every document and meeting the agent consulted
sentences.zh: 来源面板 — 列出代理人咨询的所有文件和会议

blocks.html_en: • Persistent memory & history — the agent remembers context across conversations, all searchable

sentences.en: Persistent memory & history — the agent remembers context across conversations, all searchable
sentences.zh: 持久记忆和历史——代理记住对话中的上下文，所有对话都可搜索

blocks.html_en: 🔍 Search, Tasks & Discovery

sentences.en: 🔍 Search, Tasks & Discovery
sentences.zh: 🔍 搜索、任务和发现

blocks.html_en: • Unified ⌘K search — searches across documents, meetings, and action items in one keystroke, with keyword-centered snippets

sentences.en: Unified ⌘K search — searches across documents, meetings, and action items in one keystroke, with keyword-centered snippets
sentences.zh: 统一 ⌘K 搜索 — 只需按一下键即可搜索文档、会议和操作项，并提供以关键字为中心的片段

blocks.html_en: • Full-text search (FTS5) — fast, ranked full-text search across all meeting transcripts and document bodies

sentences.en: Full-text search (FTS5) — fast, ranked full-text search across all meeting transcripts and document bodies
sentences.zh: 全文搜索 (FTS5) — 对所有会议记录和文档正文进行快速、排名的全文搜索

blocks.html_en: • Action item dashboard — every task from every meeting in one place, with smart filters (All / Pending / Overdue / Today / This Week / Completed), sort, search, and a live sidebar overdue badge

sentences.en: Action item dashboard — every task from every meeting in one place, with smart filters (All / Pending / Overdue / Today / This Week / Completed), sort, search, and a live sidebar overdue badge
sentences.zh: 行动项目仪表板 - 每次会议的每项任务都集中在一个地方，具有智能过滤器（全部/待处理/逾期/今天/本周/已完成）、排序、搜索和实时侧边栏逾期徽章

blocks.html_en: 🔒 Privacy & Security

sentences.en: 🔒 Privacy & Security
sentences.zh: 🔒 隐私与安全

blocks.html_en: • On-device AI by default — inference, transcription, and diarization run locally via MLX on Apple Silicon; no content is sent to any cloud service unless you opt into web search or an external AI provider

sentences.en: On-device AI by default — inference, transcription, and diarization run locally via MLX on Apple Silicon; no content is sent to any cloud service unless you opt into web search or an external AI provider
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，设备上的 AI — 通过 Apple Silicon 上的 MLX 在本地运行推理、转录和分类；除非您选择网络搜索或外部人工智能提供商，否则不会将任何内容发送到任何云服务

blocks.html_en: • AES-256-GCM encryption at rest — all meeting data and documents are encrypted on disk

sentences.en: AES-256-GCM encryption at rest — all meeting data and documents are encrypted on disk
sentences.zh: AES-256-GCM 静态加密 — 所有会议数据和文档均在磁盘上加密

blocks.html_en: • No account required — download and start working; there's no sign-up, no telemetry gate, no cloud dependency

sentences.en: No account required — download and start working; there's no sign-up, no telemetry gate, no cloud dependency
sentences.zh: 无需帐户 - 下载并开始工作；无需注册，没有遥测门，没有云依赖

blocks.html_en: • Sandboxed release builds — App Sandbox is enabled in production, and every entitlement exception is documented

sentences.en: Sandboxed release builds — App Sandbox is enabled in production, and every entitlement exception is documented
sentences.zh: 沙盒发布版本 - 应用程序沙盒在生产中启用，并且记录了每个权利异常

blocks.html_en: 🖼 Screenshots

sentences.en: 🖼 Screenshots
sentences.zh: 🖼 截图

blocks.html_en: <th>Meeting transcription + Ask Logue</th>

sentences.en: Meeting transcription + Ask Logue
sentences.zh: 会议转录+询问罗格

blocks.html_en: <th>Smart Minutes</th>

sentences.en: Smart Minutes
sentences.zh: 智能分钟数

blocks.html_en: <th>AI writing editor with fact-checking</th>

sentences.en: AI writing editor with fact-checking
sentences.zh: 具有事实检查功能的人工智能写作编辑器

blocks.html_en: <th>On-device PII detection</th>

sentences.en: On-device PII detection
sentences.zh: 设备上 PII 检测

blocks.html_en: 📥 Install (users)

sentences.en: 📥 Install (users)
sentences.zh: 📥 安装（用户）

blocks.html_en: Requirements: macOS 26.0 (Tahoe) or later on Apple Silicon (M1 or newer).

sentences.en: Requirements: macOS 26.0 (Tahoe) or later on Apple Silicon (M1 or newer).
sentences.zh: 要求：Apple Silicon 上的 macOS 26.0 (Tahoe) 或更高版本（M1 或更高版本）。

blocks.html_en: • Download the latest Logue-<version>.dmg from the Releases page.

sentences.en: Download the latest Logue-<version>.dmg from the Releases page.
sentences.zh: 从发布页面下载最新的 Logue-<version>.dmg。

blocks.html_en: • Open the DMG and drag Logue into your Applications folder.

sentences.en: Open the DMG and drag Logue into your Applications folder.
sentences.zh: 打开 DMG 并将 Logue 拖到您的应用程序文件夹中。

blocks.html_en: • Launch it. On first run, macOS Gatekeeper may prompt — right-click the app → Open.

sentences.en: Launch it.
sentences.zh: 启动它。

sentences.en: On first run, macOS Gatekeeper may prompt — right-click the app → Open.
sentences.zh: 首次运行时，macOS Gatekeeper 可能会提示 — 右键单击​​应用程序 → 打开。

blocks.html_en: Updates are delivered in-app via Sparkle: Logue checks the GitHub-hosted feed on launch and prompts you to install new versions. Updating only replaces the app — your meetings, documents, and downloaded models are stored separately and are never touched. To update manually, download the newest DMG and drag it over the old app.

sentences.en: Updates are delivered in-app via Sparkle: Logue checks the GitHub-hosted feed on launch and prompts you to install new versions.
sentences.zh: 更新通过 Sparkle 在应用程序内提供：Logue 在启动时检查 GitHub 托管的源并提示您安装新版本。

sentences.en: Updating only replaces the app — your meetings, documents, and downloaded models are stored separately and are never touched.
sentences.zh: 更新仅替换应用程序 - 您的会议、文档和下载的模型单独存储，永远不会被触及。

sentences.en: To update manually, download the newest DMG and drag it over the old app.
sentences.zh: 要手动更新，请下载最新的 DMG 并将其拖到旧应用程序上。

blocks.html_en: 🚀 Build from Source

sentences.en: 🚀 Build from Source
sentences.zh: 🚀 从源代码构建

blocks.html_en: Prerequisites: macOS 26.0+ (Tahoe) on Apple Silicon, Xcode 26+ (it ships the macOS 26 SDK required by SpeechTranscriber), and XcodeGen.

sentences.en: Prerequisites: macOS 26.0+ (Tahoe) on Apple Silicon, Xcode 26+ (it ships the macOS 26 SDK required by SpeechTranscriber), and XcodeGen.
sentences.zh: 先决条件：Apple Silicon 上的 macOS 26.0+ (Tahoe)、Xcode 26+（它附带 SpeechTranscriber 所需的 macOS 26 SDK）和 XcodeGen。

blocks.html_en: 1. Clone with submodules (vendored dependencies live under Vendor/):

sentences.en: Clone with submodules (vendored dependencies live under Vendor/):
sentences.zh: 使用子模块克隆（供应商依赖项位于 Vendor/ 下）：

blocks.html_en: 2. Download the Metal toolchain (one-time; required by MLX):

sentences.en: Download the Metal toolchain (one-time; required by MLX):
sentences.zh: 下载 Metal 工具链（一次性；MLX 需要）：

blocks.html_en: 3. Install tooling and generate the Xcode project:

sentences.en: Install tooling and generate the Xcode project:
sentences.zh: 安装工具并生成 Xcode 项目：

blocks.html_en: 4. Build and run — open in Xcode and hit Run, or from the CLI:

sentences.en: Build and run — open in Xcode and hit Run, or from the CLI:
sentences.zh: 构建并运行 — 在 Xcode 中打开并点击“运行”，或者从 CLI 中打开：

blocks.html_en: Already cloned without submodules? Run git submodule update --init --recursive. Re-run xcodegen generate whenever you add/remove .swift files or edit project.yml.

sentences.en: Already cloned without submodules?
sentences.zh: 已经克隆但没有子模块？

sentences.en: Run git submodule update --init --recursive.
sentences.zh: 运行 git submodule update --init --recursive。

sentences.en: Re-run xcodegen generate whenever you add/remove .swift files or edit project.yml.
sentences.zh: 每当您添加/删除 .swift 文件或编辑 project.yml 时，请重新运行 xcodegen generated。

blocks.html_en: Already cloned without submodules? Run git submodule update --init --recursive. Re-run xcodegen generate whenever you add/remove .swift files or edit project.yml.

sentences.en: Already cloned without submodules?
sentences.zh: 已经克隆但没有子模块？

sentences.en: Run git submodule update --init --recursive.
sentences.zh: 运行 git submodule update --init --recursive。

sentences.en: Re-run xcodegen generate whenever you add/remove .swift files or edit project.yml.
sentences.zh: 每当您添加/删除 .swift 文件或编辑 project.yml 时，请重新运行 xcodegen generated。

blocks.html_en: Dev builds use ad-hoc signing with the sandbox off — no Apple Developer account needed just to build and run. (In Xcode, if the build stops at signing, either pick your team under Signing & Capabilities or use the CLI flags above.) Full linting and git-hook setup are in docs/dev-setup.md.

sentences.en: Dev builds use ad-hoc signing with the sandbox off — no Apple Developer account needed just to build and run.
sentences.zh: 开发构建使用临时签名，沙箱关闭 - 不需要 Apple 开发者帐户即可构建和运行。

sentences.en: (In Xcode, if the build stops at signing, either pick your team under Signing & Capabilities or use the CLI flags above.)
sentences.zh: （在 Xcode 中，如果构建在签名时停止，请在“签名和功能”下选择您的团队或使用上面的 CLI 标志。）

sentences.en: Full linting and git-hook setup are in docs/dev-setup.md.
sentences.zh: 完整的 linting 和 git-hook 设置位于 docs/dev-setup.md 中。

blocks.html_en: ⚙️ Configuration

sentences.en: ⚙️ Configuration
sentences.zh: ⚙️配置

blocks.html_en: Logue runs fully on-device out of the box — no keys or accounts are required to build, run, or use it. Everything below is optional and only relevant if you fork the project or cut your own signed releases. Nothing is hardcoded to secrets: all credentials are read from your own environment / GitHub Actions secrets.

sentences.en: Logue runs fully on-device out of the box — no keys or accounts are required to build, run, or use it.
sentences.zh: Logue 开箱即用，完全在设备上运行——构建、运行或使用它不需要密钥或帐户。

sentences.en: Everything below is optional and only relevant if you fork the project or cut your own signed releases.
sentences.zh: 下面的所有内容都是可选的，并且仅在您分叉该项目或削减自己的签名版本时才相关。

sentences.en: Nothing is hardcoded to secrets: all credentials are read from your own environment / GitHub Actions secrets.
sentences.zh: 没有任何内容被硬编码为机密：所有凭证都是从您自己的环境/GitHub Actions 机密中读取的。

blocks.html_en: Optional external AI providers. Alongside the on-device MLX models, you can add OpenAI-/Anthropic-compatible or OpenRouter/Ollama/LM Studio endpoints under Settings → Models. Keys are entered in-app and stored in your macOS Keychain — never in the repo.

sentences.en: Optional external AI providers.
sentences.zh: 可选的外部人工智能提供商。

sentences.en: Alongside the on-device MLX models, you can add OpenAI-/Anthropic-compatible or OpenRouter/Ollama/LM Studio endpoints under Settings → Models.
sentences.zh: 除了设备上的 MLX 模型之外，您还可以在“设置”→“模型”下添加兼容 OpenAI/Anthropic 或 OpenRouter/Ollama/LM Studio 端点。

sentences.en: Keys are entered in-app and stored in your macOS Keychain — never in the repo.
sentences.zh: 密钥在应用程序内输入并存储在 macOS 钥匙串中，而不是存储在存储库中。

blocks.html_en: Running your own signed builds / releases. To ship notarized builds under your own identity, set these as GitHub Actions repository secrets (the release workflow reads them — none are committed):

sentences.en: Running your own signed builds / releases.
sentences.zh: 运行您自己签名的构建/版本。

sentences.en: To ship notarized builds under your own identity, set these as GitHub Actions repository secrets (the release workflow reads them — none are committed):
sentences.zh: 要以您自己的身份发布经过公证的构建，请将这些设置为 GitHub Actions 存储库机密（发布工作流程会读取它们 - 不会提交任何内容）：

blocks.html_en: <th>Secret</th>

sentences.en: Secret
sentences.zh: 秘密

blocks.html_en: <th>Purpose</th>

sentences.en: Purpose
sentences.zh: 目的

blocks.html_en: APPLE_TEAM_ID

sentences.en: APPLE_TEAM_ID

blocks.html_en: Apple Developer Team ID

sentences.en: Apple Developer Team ID
sentences.zh: 苹果开发者团队 ID

blocks.html_en: APPLE_CERTIFICATE_BASE64 / APPLE_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD

sentences.en: APPLE_CERTIFICATE_BASE64 / APPLE_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD

blocks.html_en: "Developer ID Application" cert (base64 .p12 + password)

sentences.en: "Developer ID Application" cert (base64 .p12 + password)
sentences.zh: “开发者 ID 应用程序”证书（base64 .p12 + 密码）

blocks.html_en: APPLE_ID / APPLE_APP_PASSWORD

sentences.en: APPLE_ID / APPLE_APP_PASSWORD

blocks.html_en: Apple ID + app-specific password for notarization

sentences.en: Apple ID + app-specific password for notarization
sentences.zh: Apple ID + 应用专用密码进行公证

blocks.html_en: SPARKLE_PRIVATE_KEY

sentences.en: SPARKLE_PRIVATE_KEY

blocks.html_en: EdDSA key that signs auto-update ZIPs

sentences.en: EdDSA key that signs auto-update ZIPs
sentences.zh: 用于签署自动更新 ZIP 的 EdDSA 密钥

blocks.html_en: For a signed fork you'll also want to change, in project.yml:

sentences.en: For a signed fork you'll also want to change, in project.yml:
sentences.zh: 对于签名的 fork，您还需要在 project.yml 中进行更改：

blocks.html_en: • the bundle identifier (PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER, default com.bitwize.logue);

sentences.en: the bundle identifier (PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER, default com.bitwize.logue);
sentences.zh: 捆绑包标识符（PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER，默认 com.bitwize.logue）；

blocks.html_en: • the iCloud container identifiers (iCloud.com.bitwize.logue) in Logue.entitlements — these are tied to your Apple Developer account, so point them at a container you own if you want iCloud sync (or remove them). The shipped release entitlements don't include iCloud, so signed release builds aren't affected;

sentences.en: the iCloud container identifiers (iCloud.com.bitwize.logue) in Logue.entitlements — these are tied to your Apple Developer account, so point them at a container you own if you want iCloud sync (or remove them).
sentences.zh: Logue.entitlements 中的 iCloud 容器标识符 (iCloud.com.bitwize.logue) — 这些与您的 Apple 开发者帐户绑定，因此如果您想要 iCloud 同步（或删除它们），请将它们指向您拥有的容器。

sentences.en: The shipped release entitlements don't include iCloud, so signed release builds aren't affected;
sentences.zh: 附带的发行版权利不包括 iCloud，因此已签名的发行版不受影响；

blocks.html_en: • to run your own update channel, SUFeedURL + SUPublicEDKey.

sentences.en: to run your own update channel, SUFeedURL + SUPublicEDKey.
sentences.zh: 运行您自己的更新通道 SUFeedURL + SUPublicEDKey。

blocks.html_en: Building and running unsigned dev builds needs none of the above. See docs/dev-setup.md and docs/SPARKLE_UPDATE_FLOW.md.

sentences.en: Building and running unsigned dev builds needs none of the above.
sentences.zh: 构建和运行未签名的开发版本不需要上述任何内容。

sentences.en: See docs/dev-setup.md and docs/SPARKLE_UPDATE_FLOW.md.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 docs/dev-setup.md 和 docs/SPARKLE_UPDATE_FLOW.md。

sentences.zh: 📚 文档

sentences.en: 🗺 Project Layout
sentences.zh: 🗺 项目布局

blocks.html_en: • Logue/ — Main Swift source; SwiftUI + AppKit application target.

sentences.en: Logue/ — Main Swift source; SwiftUI + AppKit application target.
sentences.zh: Logue/ — 主要 Swift 源代码； SwiftUI + AppKit 应用程序目标。

blocks.html_en: • Logue/Engine/ — LLM inference actor, prompt builders, and retry helpers. All AI logic lives here.

sentences.en: Logue/Engine/ — LLM inference actor, prompt builders, and retry helpers.
sentences.zh: Logue/Engine/ — LLM 推理参与者、提示构建器和重试助手。

sentences.en: All AI logic lives here.
sentences.zh: 所有人工智能逻辑都存在于此。

blocks.html_en: • Logue/Services/ — Recording pipeline, transcription, speaker diarization, encryption, and scheduling services.

sentences.en: Logue/Services/ — Recording pipeline, transcription, speaker diarization, encryption, and scheduling services.
sentences.zh: Logue/Services/ — 录音管道、转录、说话者分类、加密和调度服务。

blocks.html_en: • Logue/Views/ — All SwiftUI views: Meeting workspace, Writing editor, Ask Logue chat, Action items, Settings, and more.

sentences.en: Logue/Views/ — All SwiftUI views: Meeting workspace, Writing editor, Ask Logue chat, Action items, Settings, and more.
sentences.zh: Logue/Views/ — 所有 SwiftUI 视图：会议工作区、写作编辑器、询问 Logue 聊天、操作项、设置等。

blocks.html_en: • LogueTests/ — Swift Testing suites (@Suite, @Test), including real-inference LLM integration tests.

sentences.en: LogueTests/ — Swift Testing suites (@Suite, @Test), including real-inference LLM integration tests.
sentences.zh: LogueTests/ — Swift 测试套件（@Suite、@Test），包括真实推理 LLM 集成测试。

blocks.html_en: • Vendor/ — Vendored git submodule dependencies — no remote access required at build time.

sentences.en: Vendor/ — Vendored git submodule dependencies — no remote access required at build time.
sentences.zh: Vendor/ — 供应的 git 子模块依赖项 — 构建时不需要远程访问。

blocks.html_en: • docs/ — Developer setup and release documentation.

sentences.en: docs/ — Developer setup and release documentation.
sentences.zh: docs/ — 开发人员设置和发布文档。

blocks.html_en: • scripts/ — Release build script, Sparkle appcast updater, and export options plist.

sentences.en: scripts/ — Release build script, Sparkle appcast updater, and export options plist.
sentences.zh: scripts/ — 发布构建脚本、Sparkle appcast 更新程序和导出选项 plist。

blocks.html_en: 👏 Contributing

sentences.en: 👏 Contributing
sentences.zh: 👏 贡献

blocks.html_en: Contributions are welcome! Read CONTRIBUTING.md for setup and the security, concurrency, and SwiftLint standards enforced on every pull request. The full, always-current ruleset the project builds against lives in CLAUDE.md.

sentences.en: Contributions are welcome!
sentences.zh: 欢迎贡献！

sentences.en: Read CONTRIBUTING.md for setup and the security, concurrency, and SwiftLint standards enforced on every pull request.
sentences.zh: 阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md 了解设置以及每个拉取请求上强制执行的安全性、并发性和 SwiftLint 标准。

sentences.en: The full, always-current ruleset the project builds against lives in CLAUDE.md.
sentences.zh: 该项目根据 CLAUDE.md 中的生活构建的完整且始终最新的规则集。

blocks.html_en: Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue.

sentences.en: Found a bug or have an idea?
sentences.zh: 发现错误或有想法？

sentences.en: Open an issue.
sentences.zh: 打开一个问题。

blocks.html_en: ❓ FAQ
Have questions about using Logue? Check the FAQ on our site, or email us at support@bitwize.ai.

sentences.en: Have questions about using Logue?
sentences.zh: 对使用 Logue 有疑问吗？

sentences.en: Check the FAQ on our site, or email us at support@bitwize.ai.
sentences.zh: 查看我们网站上的常见问题解答，或发送电子邮件至 support@bitwize.ai。

sentences.zh: Logue 是根据 MIT 许可证开源的 — © 2026 Bitwize。

content_html_zh:
适用于 macOS 的隐私优先 AI 会议笔记和写作助手。 设备上转录、智能分钟和 60 多种书写模式 — 全部由 Apple Silicon 提供支持。 一切都不会离开你的 Mac。

下载 macOS 版 • 从源代码构建 • 贡献 • 请求功能

介绍

Logue 是一款隐私优先的 macOS 人工智能会议笔记和写作助手。 它结合了实时音频转录、扬声器分类和智能文档编辑——所有这些都通过 Apple Silicon 上的 MLX 在设备上完全供电。 默认情况下，您的会议、笔记和对话保留在 Mac 上 - 唯一的网络调用是设备上模型下载、更新检查以及您明确启用的选择加入功能（网络搜索和外部 AI 提供商）。

该存储库包含完整的 Logue 应用程序源：LLM 引擎、记录管道、代理 AI 聊天、写作编辑器和测试套件。 Bitwize 为希望在不牺牲隐私的情况下充分利用 AI 功能的专业人士和学生打造 Logue。

新来的？ 阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md 进行设置并了解每个拉取请求遵循的标准。

✨ 特点

🎙 会议情报

  • 实时转录 — 由 Apple 的 SpeechTranscriber (macOS 26+) 提供支持，直接传输音频，无缓冲延迟
  • 说话人分类 — 使用 FluidAudio 的 Sortformer 模型识别和标记各个说话人，并通过批量回退来提高准确性
  • 系统音频捕获——通过ScreenCaptureKit同时录制麦克风和系统音频；没有会议机器人加入您的通话
  • 智能会议记录 — 生成包含关键决策、主题和后续行动的结构化摘要
  • 智能转录亮点——AI自动提取最重要时刻；手动书签始终保留
  • 行动项目提取——自动从记录中提取任务、所有者和截止日期
  • 会议准备简报——在会议开始前，人工智能根据链接文档和之前的笔记生成背景简报
  • 会议 ↔ 文档链接 — 会议和相关文档之间的双向链接，带有编辑器中的反向链接芯片

✍️ AI写作编辑器

  • 基于块的富文本编辑器 - 基于 NSTextView 构建，具有完整的 SwiftUI 集成
  • 语法和清晰度建议——内联人工智能支持的建议，一键接受
  • 语气分析——检测并调整所选文本的语气
  • 词汇量增强——建议更丰富的替代方案，并根据实际文档内容进行验证
  • 重写和审查小组 - 重写选定的段落或获取整个文档的结构反馈
  • 事实验证——标记可能需要来源的声明
  • 表格支持 - 编辑器内的完整表格创建、编辑和上下文菜单
  • 写作目标——设定并跟踪字数、阅读水平和语气目标

🤖 Ask Logue — Agentic AI 聊天

  • 多步代理推理——由 LangGraph-Swift 提供支持；计划、原因和执行多步骤工作流程
  • 流式响应——带有动画指示器的实时逐个令牌输出
  • 内联图和 LaTeX — 直接在聊天线程中渲染美人鱼图和数学表达式
  • 深度研究模式——长期运行的多源研究任务的进度跟踪
  • 工具执行 UI — 通过批准控制准确显示代理正在采取的操作
  • 来源面板 — 列出代理人咨询的所有文件和会议
  • 持久记忆和历史——代理记住对话中的上下文，所有对话都可搜索

🔍 搜索、任务和发现

  • 统一 ⌘K 搜索 — 只需按一下键即可搜索文档、会议和操作项，并提供以关键字为中心的片段
  • 全文搜索 (FTS5) — 对所有会议记录和文档正文进行快速、排名的全文搜索
  • 行动项目仪表板 - 每次会议的每项任务都集中在一个地方，具有智能过滤器（全部/待处理/逾期/今天/本周/已完成）、排序、搜索和实时侧边栏逾期徽章

🔒 隐私与安全

  • 默认情况下，设备上的 AI — 通过 Apple Silicon 上的 MLX 在本地运行推理、转录和分类；除非您选择网络搜索或外部人工智能提供商，否则不会将任何内容发送到任何云服务
  • AES-256-GCM 静态加密 — 所有会议数据和文档均在磁盘上加密
  • 无需帐户 - 下载并开始工作；无需注册，没有遥测门，没有云依赖
  • 沙盒发布版本 - 应用程序沙盒在生产中启用，并且记录了每个权利异常

🖼 截图

会议转录+询问罗格 智能分钟数
具有事实检查功能的人工智能写作编辑器 设备上 PII 检测

📥 安装（用户）

要求：Apple Silicon 上的 macOS 26.0 (Tahoe) 或更高版本（M1 或更高版本）。

  1. 从发布页面下载最新的 Logue-<version>.dmg。
  2. 打开 DMG 并将 Logue 拖到您的应用程序文件夹中。
  3. 启动它。 首次运行时，macOS Gatekeeper 可能会提示 — 右键单击​​应用程序 → 打开。

更新通过 Sparkle 在应用程序内提供：Logue 在启动时检查 GitHub 托管的源并提示您安装新版本。 更新仅替换应用程序 - 您的会议、文档和下载的模型单独存储，永远不会被触及。 要手动更新，请下载最新的 DMG 并将其拖到旧应用程序上。

🚀 从源代码构建

先决条件：Apple Silicon 上的 macOS 26.0+ (Tahoe)、Xcode 26+（它附带 SpeechTranscriber 所需的 macOS 26 SDK）和 XcodeGen。

1. 使用子模块克隆（供应商依赖项位于 Vendor/ 下）：

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/bitwize-ai/Logue.git
cd Logue

2. 下载 Metal 工具链（一次性；MLX 需要）：

xcodebuild -downloadComponent MetalToolchain

3. 安装工具并生成 Xcode 项目：

brew install xcodegen swiftformat swiftlint
xcodegen generate

4. 构建并运行 — 在 Xcode 中打开并点击“运行”，或者从 CLI 中打开：

# The signing flags let you build without an Apple Developer account.
xcodebuild build -project Logue.xcodeproj -scheme Logue -destination 'platform=macOS' \
  CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="-" CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
open Logue.xcodeproj
已经克隆但没有子模块？ 运行 git submodule update --init --recursive。 每当您添加/删除 .swift 文件或编辑 project.yml 时，请重新运行 xcodegen generated。

开发构建使用临时签名，沙箱关闭 - 不需要 Apple 开发者帐户即可构建和运行。 （在 Xcode 中，如果构建在签名时停止，请在“签名和功能”下选择您的团队或使用上面的 CLI 标志。） 完整的 linting 和 git-hook 设置位于 docs/dev-setup.md 中。

⚙️配置

Logue 开箱即用，完全在设备上运行——构建、运行或使用它不需要密钥或帐户。 下面的所有内容都是可选的，并且仅在您分叉该项目或削减自己的签名版本时才相关。 没有任何内容被硬编码为机密：所有凭证都是从您自己的环境/GitHub Actions 机密中读取的。

可选的外部人工智能提供商。 除了设备上的 MLX 模型之外，您还可以在“设置”→“模型”下添加兼容 OpenAI/Anthropic 或 OpenRouter/Ollama/LM Studio 端点。 密钥在应用程序内输入并存储在 macOS 钥匙串中，而不是存储在存储库中。

运行您自己签名的构建/版本。 要以您自己的身份发布经过公证的构建，请将这些设置为 GitHub Actions 存储库机密（发布工作流程会读取它们 - 不会提交任何内容）：

秘密 目的
APPLE_TEAM_ID 苹果开发者团队 ID
APPLE_CERTIFICATE_BASE64 / APPLE_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD “开发者 ID 应用程序”证书（base64 .p12 + 密码）
APPLE_ID / APPLE_APP_PASSWORD Apple ID + 应用专用密码进行公证
SPARKLE_PRIVATE_KEY 用于签署自动更新 ZIP 的 EdDSA 密钥

对于签名的 fork，您还需要在 project.yml 中进行更改：

  • 捆绑包标识符（PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER，默认 com.bitwize.logue）；
  • Logue.entitlements 中的 iCloud 容器标识符 (iCloud.com.bitwize.logue) — 这些与您的 Apple 开发者帐户绑定，因此如果您想要 iCloud 同步（或删除它们），请将它们指向您拥有的容器。 附带的发行版权利不包括 iCloud，因此已签名的发行版不受影响；
  • 运行您自己的更新通道 SUFeedURL + SUPublicEDKey。

构建和运行未签名的开发版本不需要上述任何内容。 请参阅 docs/dev-setup.md 和 docs/SPARKLE_UPDATE_FLOW.md。

🗺 项目布局

  • Logue/ — 主要 Swift 源代码； SwiftUI + AppKit 应用程序目标。
  • Logue/Engine/ — LLM 推理参与者、提示构建器和重试助手。 所有人工智能逻辑都存在于此。
  • Logue/Services/ — 录音管道、转录、说话者分类、加密和调度服务。
  • Logue/Views/ — 所有 SwiftUI 视图：会议工作区、写作编辑器、询问 Logue 聊天、操作项、设置等。
  • LogueTests/ — Swift 测试套件（@Suite、@Test），包括真实推理 LLM 集成测试。
  • Vendor/ — 供应的 git 子模块依赖项 — 构建时不需要远程访问。
  • docs/ — 开发人员设置和发布文档。
  • scripts/ — 发布构建脚本、Sparkle appcast 更新程序和导出选项 plist。

👏 贡献

欢迎贡献！ 阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md 了解设置以及每个拉取请求上强制执行的安全性、并发性和 SwiftLint 标准。 该项目根据 CLAUDE.md 中的生活构建的完整且始终最新的规则集。

发现错误或有想法？ 打开一个问题。

❓ FAQ

对使用 Logue 有疑问吗？ 查看我们网站上的常见问题解答，或发送电子邮件至 support@bitwize.ai。

📄 许可证

Logue 是根据 MIT 许可证开源的 — © 2026 Bitwize。

Vendor/ 下的一些供应商依赖项是单独许可的（MIT、BSD、Apache-2.0）；有关详细信息，请参阅每个包。
